title: Fixing the American Dream with Andrew Schulz
description:
(0:00) The Besties intro Andrew Schulz!

(3:29) Friedberg hits a quick Science Corner on the future of fertility

(9:35) Reacting to Gavin Newsom's new podcast: genius or pandering?

(19:36) Tariff experiment so far: risks, communication issues, and more

(30:44) Why the American Dream is broken and how to fix it: cracking the housing market, social security reform

(55:45) Aligning upside via increased stock market participation

(1:11:23) How Andrew blew up in comedy, going direct via YouTube, building a cancel-proof following

(1:22:25) State of America, conspiracy obsession, thoughts on Trump and DOGE

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses the American Dream with Andrew Schulz, covering topics like the housing market, social security reform, and increasing stock market participation. They also react to Gavin Newsom's new podcast and discuss the state of America. Andrew shares his experience in comedy and building a following on YouTube.

takeaways.text: Increased stock market participation can help
Cancel culture is a threat to free speech
The state of America is divided

sentiment.notes: The mood is mixed, with discussions on both the problems with the American Dream and potential solutions, as well as the challenges faced by comedians and content creators.

notable_moments.description: Andrew shares his experience in comedy
